text: ABC Sports Pvt Ltd shall pay Rs 500000 to Rahul Verma for 12 months in Mumbai.
XYZ Brands Private Limited agrees to pay Rs 200000 to Ankit Sharma for 6 months in Delhi.
The agreement starts on 12/03/2026 and ends on 12/03/2027.
The sponsor shall provide a bonus of Rs 100000 to Rohan Mehta.
Puma India shall compensate Arjun Singh with Rs 300000.
This agreement shall remain valid for 24 months.
Any dispute shall be resolved in New Delhi.
Nike India Private Limited shall pay Rs 700000 to Virat Kohli.
Adidas India agrees to pay Rs 250000 to Neha Kapoor for 18 months.
The event shall take place in Bengaluru on 01/05/2026.
Sony Sports Network agrees to pay Rs 900000 to Aman Verma in Chennai.
The contract duration shall be 36 months.
Star Sports shall pay a fee of Rs 150000 to Karan Malhotra.
The agreement was signed on 15/08/2025 in Hyderabad.
Red Bull India will pay Rs 400000 to Sanya Mehra for 10 months.
Infosys Limited agrees to sponsor Rajat Sharma in Pune.
The final payment of Rs 600000 shall be released on 30/06/2026.
Amazon India shall pay Rs 850000 to Priya Nair for 8 months in Kochi.
The sponsorship term begins on 01/01/2026 and lasts 12 months.
Reliance Brands Limited shall pay Rs 1000000 to Deepak Yadav.
